title: Kurziodendron viridissimum

The classification of Kurziodendron viridissimum includes its kingdom as Plantae, its phylum as Magnoliophyta, its class as Rosidae, and its order as Sapindales. Within the family Anacardiaceae, Kurziodendron viridissimum is placed in the genus Kurziodendron. Kurziodendron viridissimum is further classified into the species level due to its unique characteristics.
